candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets.
Balancing line, not preferred over the reported total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Wrong section and balancing line.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash at the End of the Period
candidates.why: Matches ending cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash in the Beginning of the Period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet point-in-time cash target.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Operating cash flow, not cash balance.
Direct match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not preferred over the reported total.
Wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best direct balance-sheet match for short-term financing debt/current borrowings, excluding leases.
Can represent short-term financing debt and may be a separate component of current debt.
Current financing debt appears in one year and may be a component when disclosed separately, but presentation is inconsistent.
Cash-flow movement, not balance-sheet short-term debt stock.

variables.notes: Selected apparent current financing-debt components and excluded lease liabilities. Manual review recommended because it is unclear whether overdrafts are already included in 'Financial Liabilities - Short-Term', creating possible overlap.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Direct match for PPE; preferred over right-of-use assets and intangible lines.
Tangible asset but lease-related right-of-use asset, not the standard PPE total when a direct PPE line exists.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - excluding Goodwill - Net - Total
candidates.why: Intangible assets, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Disposal of intangible and tangible fixed assets
candidates.why: Cash-flow line, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Used the direct reported PPE line.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total assets line.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow target.

final_choice.row_label: As Reported Cash from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Chose the final reported operating cash flow line rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
